description_long: This microwave features a rectangular, boxy form with a wood-textured exterior, giving it a retro appearance. The front face is dominated by a large, dark glass or plastic window, bordered by a thick frame, which serves as the viewing area for the interior. To the right of the window, there is a vertical control panel with two large round dials at the top and three smaller circular buttons below, all set in a metallic or plastic strip. The sides and top are plain, showcasing the wood grain pattern without any visible seams, handles, or vents. The back is also unadorned, maintaining the same wood finish as the rest of the body. The overall design is simple and functional, with the control panel and window being the only visually distinct features.
description: A retro-style microwave with a wood-textured exterior, a large dark window, and a vertical control panel with dials and buttons on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large dark window, the vertical control panel with two dials and three buttons, and the wood-textured frame.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain wood-textured surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a completely flat, uninterrupted wood-textured surface with no visible vents or panels.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing only the wood-textured surface without any controls or openings.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring two large round dials at the top and three smaller circular buttons below. The panel is set in a metallic or plastic strip, with no visible labeling or digital display.
attribute_door_handle_design: There is no distinct external door handle; the door appears to be opened by gripping the edge of the window frame or via a push-to-open mechanism.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any surface of the object.
attribute_window_presence: A large, dark, rectangular window is present on the front door, occupying most of the left side of the front face.
